spec.name: The Great Hall
spec.description: You are standing in the north-west end of the Great Hall. It is truly vast; the roof is so high above your head, that it seems no closer than the clouds outside. The roof is beautifully painted, by someone who must have been a true master. The hall is very large, and could easily seat several hundred people at a banquet. To your east, you see King Welmar's great throne, and to the west there is an exit to a passage.

east.description: You see the part of the Great Hall where the throne is.

south.description: You see the King's Great Hall.

extra_descs.description: The paintings on the roof depict the great heroes and gods. One of the gods is fairly heavy-bellied and incredibly hairy, with a massive beard. Also among them are the great enemies and wrongdoers, such as the evil Goddess Yochlol and the powerful evil Wizard Tharoecon.
